note_families.policy: Single-member LLC franchising quick-service restaurants; revenue from royalties and license agreements

policies: Receivables due within 30 days with lifetime ECL
Revenue: royalties earned; franchise fees straight-line over FA term
Not subject to income tax (single-member LLC)
Fair value: restricted cash and AR approximate book value

note_families.detail: Franchise agreements $48,116K gross, 17yr useful life, $28,108K net. Annual amortization $2,833K. No impairment.
Deferred franchise fees $8,904K. Revenue recognized from prior deferred $558K (2025). Future: $417K/yr declining, $6,858K thereafter.
Guarantees $1,402,563K Sonic Securitization Notes. VFN: $25M capacity, $12.4M LOC outstanding, $12.6M remaining. Legal matters: no material adverse effect expected.
Licenses trademarks from Affiliates; license fees based on royalty fees collected. Results may not be indicative of standalone.
Evaluated through March 19, 2026. No items to disclose.

note_families.policy: Provides franchising services; revenue from royalties, leases to franchisees/affiliates

policies: Cash in excess of FDIC limits
Goodwill tested annually Q4 — no impairment
Revenue: royalties earned, franchise fees straight-line over FA term, rental income straight-line
Income taxes: single-member LLC not taxed directly; parent responsibility
Debt issuance costs amortized via effective interest method

note_families.detail: AR: royalties $25.7M, gift cards $7.1M, allowance ($5.5M). Property: land $123.6M, buildings $60.1M, equipment $5.1M. Gift card liability $36.7M.
Trademark $1.1B indefinite-lived. Franchise agreements $250M gross, 17yr, $146M net. Software $3.6M gross, $1.7M net. Amortization $16.3M (2025). No impairment.
Securitization Notes $1,402,563K total. 5 tranches (2.19%-4.34%). Fair value $1,329.1M (Level 2). Current portion $14,750K. $617M due 2027. In compliance with all covenants. LOC $12.4M outstanding.

Operating leases to affiliates/franchisees. Lease term up to 9 years. Rent: fixed or 5%-10% of gross sales. Variable rent income $8.4M/yr. Assets leased: net $61.7M. Future minimum receivables $23.9M.
Deferred franchise fees $10,925K. Revenue recognized $896K (2025). Future: $673K (2026) declining, $7,846K thereafter.

Not subject to income tax as single-member LLC since 2023 conversion. Prior year: effective rate (0.1)% (2024), (179.8)% (2023, includes tax entity status change). All subsidiaries now single-member LLCs.
Admin services to Brand Tech Fund and SBF. Admin fee ~15% of Fund receipts: $22.5M (2025). IRB note receivable repaid July 2024.
Legal matters: no material adverse effect. Securitization note covenants: in compliance.
Evaluated through March 19, 2026. No items to disclose.
